daily.today_energy: Your intuition is firing on all cylinders today, Pisces. Trust those gut feelings—they're basically your superpower rn. The universe is whispering, and you're actually listening. That's the main character energy we love to see.
daily.love: Someone might be picking up on your vibe today, and honestly, you're glowing. Whether you're coupled up or solo, there's a softness around your energy that's magnetic. Let yourself be a little vulnerable—it's actually your strongest move.
daily.career: Your creative ideas have serious potential today. Don't sleep on that project or thought you've been sitting on. The cosmos is basically giving you permission to pitch it, collaborate, or just start building. Your vision matters.
daily.health: Your body's asking you to slow down and actually rest. Not scrolling in bed—real rest. Moving gently, hydrating, maybe some quiet time that fills your cup instead of draining it. Listen to what you need.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is inviting you to trust your gut more than usual. Mercury's dance has you feeling unusually articulate about your needs, so speak up. Your intuition is basically a cheat code right now—lean into it hard.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled or single, there's a softness in the air that's kind of irresistible. If you've been holding back vulnerable conversations, the vibes support honesty this week. Let people see the real, messy you.
weekly.career: Your creative ideas are actually fire rn. Even if imposter syndrome tries to crash the party, remember that your perspective is needed. Small wins are building toward something bigger—stay patient and show up consistently.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness this week. Rest isn't lazy; it's strategic. If you've been running on fumes, this is your sign to actually prioritize sleep and movement that feels good, not punishing. Listen to what feels nourishing.
